queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the relationship between negative checking account balances and decreased credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical assessment of the impact of savings balances below 100 DM on credit risk mitigation.
